# displayPriority

**Interface Property**

A hint the map uses to prioritize displaying the annotation.

## Declaration

```swift
displayPriority?: number;
```

## Discussion

The default value is `Annotation.DisplayPriority.Required.`

## Setting position and appearances

- **anchorOffset**: The offset, in CSS pixels, of the element from the bottom center.
- **appearanceAnimation**: A CSS animation that runs when the annotation appears on the map.
- **padding**: Spacing to add around the annotation when showing items.
- **size**: The desired dimensions of the annotation, in CSS pixels.
- **visible**: A Boolean value that determines whether the annotation is visible or hidden.
